Bug / Task Description: Adding a node inserts its virtual-node hashes into the sorted ring slice, but the shift that makes room for a new value moves the wrong span, overwriting existing positions and leaving the ring unsorted. Since every key lookup binary-searches the ring, key placement, balance, and minimal-disruption guarantees all degrade. Keep the ring correctly sorted after inserts.
Commit Subject: fix(hash): keep the ring sorted when adding virtual nodes
